posts.title: Welcome to the Journey Coach Blog
posts.author: John Paine
posts.summary: An introduction to navigating high-stakes business transitions and aligning your personal vision with company growth.
posts.body:
Leadership isn't just about strategy; it's about self-awareness. Using the Enneagram as our map, we will navigate obstacles and uncover your path to a fulfilling career and life.

## The First Step

Identifying the destination is just the first hurdle; charting the course is the real challenge. As your executive coach, my role is to help you navigate that terrain with confidence.

* Diagnose: Leadership patterns
* Design: Role clarity
* Develop: Executive presence

Welcome to the journey.

posts.author: John Paine
posts.title: Purpose
posts.body:
energy follows focus.

purpose provides rails for focus
